title: I've accidentally deleted the 'Create a contact' column, how do I restore or add a new one?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, I’ve accidentally deleted the ‘Create a Contact’ column from my Leads board. How do I either restore it or add a new one? 
Thank you in advance for any help!

posts.author: BrendanJH (Brendan Hutchieson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’ve accidentally deleted the ‘Create a Contact’ column from my Leads board. How do I either restore it or add a new one?

Thank you in advance for any help!

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BrendanJH,

Click your Avatar in the bottom left corner, then Trash. If you deleted it less than 30 days ago, you should see it there and be able to restore it.
